General.Name: Huijing Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Huijing Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property development and investment activities in the People's Republic of China. The company's property portfolio consists of residential and commercial properties; and parcels of land. It also undertakes urban renewal projects covering integrated and industry-specific property projects; and rents real estate properties. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Dongguan, the People's Republic of China. Huijing Holdings Company Limited is a subsidiary of Wui Ying Holdings Limited.
